pi_items.source: IANA timezone database (https://www.iana.org/time-zones), Wikipedia List of tz database time zones (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones), confirmed as valid in Python's zoneinfo library documentation (https://docs.python.org/3/library/zoneinfo.html), and used in Odoo forum discussions for timezone configuration

Odoo GitHub repository commits and issues (https://github.com/odoo/odoo/commit/2950ffaa86ef38263e9a4a59a30d0768f82a61fa, https://github.com/odoo/odoo/issues/202681, https://github.com/odoo/odoo/issues/31481) confirm 'email' and 'inbox' as valid values for res.users.notification_type field. 'email' corresponds to 'Handle by Emails' option in the Odoo user preferences UI.

setup_odoo.sh (line 143) explicitly states: 'echo "Admin login: admin / admin"'. This is the default Odoo admin user created during database initialization (-d odoo_scheduling). The same credentials are used throughout setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to configure the Odoo admin user's preferences. The verified target values are: Timezone='America/Chicago' (valid IANA timezone identifier), Notification preference='email' (valid res.users field value, maps to 'Handle by Emails' in UI), and the admin user is 'admin' (default Odoo admin user created during environment initialization). The baseline state is set to differ from these targets by setup_task.sh (uses xmlrpc to read current prefs and reset them if already at target values), ensuring the verifier can detect genuine agent actions.
